name: universal-reverse-engineering
description: Reverse engineer Android, iOS, Windows, Linux, macOS, and .NET binaries. Auto-installs all tools, decompiles any target, detects 40+ vulnerability classes, and generates working PoC exploit scripts.

commands_list.name: analyze
commands_list.description: Auto-detect and analyze any binary or app (APK/EXE/ELF/IPA). Installs tools, runs full static analysis, reports findings.

commands_list.name: decompile
commands_list.description: Decompile any binary or app and generate working PoC scripts for discovered vulnerabilities. Supports APK/XAPK/EXE/DLL/ELF/IPA.

commands_list.name: vuln_poc
commands_list.description: Deep vulnerability scan — finds real offsets, validation bypasses, and codebase logic flaws. Generates runnable Python/Bash/C exploit scripts (SSL bypass, BOF, SQLi, deserialization, etc.).

commands_list.name: vuln-scan
commands_list.description: Run vulnerability scanner on source code or binary. Detects 40+ classes: memory safety, injection, crypto, secrets, deserialization, web.
